question.label: Specific enough
question.name: What was missing from that feedback that would have helped you act on it?
question.description: Drills into the specific gap in the feedback so the blocker becomes actionable.

assessment.note: Names missing scope clarity as the absent ingredient that would make feedback actionable — strong growth blocker and mild clarity deficit; [THREAD-DEFERRED] clearer scope.

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?

new_queue.label: Current footing
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately, Maria?

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?

new_queue.label: Principal bar
new_queue.name: What does the next-level bar for Principal look like to you?

new_queue.label: Tradeoffs ahead
new_queue.name: What would you be willing to trade off to make room for the next step?

new_queue.label: Next move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what is the next step you want to take before we meet again?
